beetroot.tip: Cut off the leaves before storing in the fridge.

bell pepper.tip: Store in the crisper drawer of your fridge.

cabbage.tip: Wrap tightly in plastic and refrigerate.

capsicum.tip: Store in the crisper drawer of your fridge.

carrot.tip: Store in a plastic bag in the crisper drawer.

cauliflower.tip: Keep wrapped in plastic in the fridge.

chilli pepper.tip: Store in a paper bag in the crisper drawer.

corn.tip: Leave husks on and refrigerate immediately.

cucumber.tip: Wrap in a paper towel and refrigerate.

eggplant.tip: Store at room temperature or in the crisper drawer.

garlic.tip: Store in a cool, dark, and dry place.

ginger.tip: Store unpeeled in a resealable bag in the fridge.

jalapeno.tip: Store in a paper bag in the crisper drawer.

lettuce.tip: Keep unwashed in a plastic bag in the fridge.

onion.tip: Store in a cool, dark, well-ventilated space.

paprika.tip: Store in the crisper drawer of your fridge.

peas.tip: Keep refrigerated in a perforated plastic bag.

potato.tip: Store in a cool, dark place away from onions.

radish.tip: Remove tops and store in a plastic bag in the fridge.

soy beans.tip: Store in a perforated bag in the fridge.

spinach.tip: Store in a plastic container with a paper towel to absorb moisture.

sweetpotato.tip: Store in a cool, dark place. Do not refrigerate.

tomato.tip: Do not refrigerate; it loses flavor and turns mealy.

turnip.tip: Store in the fridge wrapped in a moist cloth.

apple.tip: Keep in the refrigerator crisper drawer.

banana.tip: Store at room temperature away from other fruits to slow ripening.

grapes.tip: Store unwashed in a perforated bag in the fridge.

kiwi.tip: Store in the fridge to pause ripening.

lemon.tip: Store in a sealed bag in the fridge to prevent drying out.

mango.tip: Store at room temperature until ripe, then refrigerate.

orange.tip: Store in the crisper drawer or a cool, dry place.

pear.tip: Ripen at room temperature, then store in the fridge.

pineapple.tip: Store in the fridge after cutting.

watermelon.tip: Store uncut at room temperature, refrigerate after cutting.
